zh.lifeSummary: 當William Borthwick 1st Lord Borthwick於1411年5月1日出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安諾斯 米德萊頓時，他的父親William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick20歲，母親Beatrice Sinclair22歲。他於1457年之前與Margaret Hoppringle結婚。他去世於1484年2月7日在蘇格蘭享年72歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安格雷布利其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Borthwick 1st Lord Borthwick于1411年5月1日出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安諾斯 米德萊頓时，他的父亲William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick20岁，母亲Beatrice Sinclair22岁。他于1457年之前与Margaret Hoppringle结婚。他去世于1484年2月7日在苏格兰享年72岁，埋葬在苏格兰米德洛迪安格雷布利其。

nameMeanings.name: Borthwick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the old barony of Borthwick, formerly Loquhariot (Midlothian) and possibly also from Borthwick (Roxburghshire). The placenames are from Old English bord ‘board, table’ + wīc ‘outlying dairy farm’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Borthwick 1st Lord Borthwick was born on 1 May 1411, in North Middleton, Midlothian, Scotland, his father, William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick, was 20 and his mother, Beatrice Sinclair, was 22. He married Margaret Hoppringle before 1457. He died on 7 February 1484, in Scotland, at the age of 72, and was buried in Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Borthwick 1st Lord Borthwick est né le 1 mai 1411, à North Middleton, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Sinclair, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Hoppringle avant 1457. Il est décédé le 7 février 1484, à Écosse, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Gorebridge, Midlothian, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Borthwick 1st Lord Borthwick am 1. Mai 1411 in North Middleton, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick 20 und seine Mutter Beatrice Sinclair 22. Er hat vor 1457 Margaret Hoppringle geheiratet. Er starb am 7. Februar 1484 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Borthwick 1st Lord Borthwick è nato il il 1 maggio 1411 nel North Middleton, Midlothian, Scotland, il suo padre, William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Beatrice Sinclair, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Hoppringle prima del 1457. Morì il 7 febbraio 1484, nel Scotland, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: William Borthwick 1st Lord Borthwickが1411年5月1日にスコットランドミドロスアンノース ミッドレトンで生まれた時，父William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwickは20歳，母Beatrice Sinclairは22歳であった。1457年以前にMargaret Hoppringleと結婚した。彼は1484年2月7日にスコットランドで72歳で死去し，スコットランドミドロスアンゴアブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Borthwick 1st Lord Borthwick(이)가 1411년 5월 1일 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 노르스 미들레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrice Sinclair(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1457년 이전 Margaret Hoppringle(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1484년 2월 7일 스컷랜드에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 고레브리지에 묻혔다.

pt.1 May 1411–7 February 1484: 1 de maio de 1411–7 de fevereiro de 1484
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Borthwick 1st Lord Borthwick nasceu em 1 de maio de 1411, em North Middleton, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Sinclair, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Hoppringle antes 1457. Ele faleceu em 7 de fevereiro de 1484, em Scotland, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Borthwick 1st Lord Borthwick родился 1 мая 1411 г. в местности норт миддлетон, мидлотян, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Sinclair, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Hoppringle перед 1457 г. Он умер 7 февраля 1484 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности горебридж, мидлотян, Шотландия.

es.1 May 1411–7 February 1484: 1 de mayo de 1411–7 de febrero de 1484
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Borthwick 1st Lord Borthwick nació el 1 de mayo de 1411, en North Middleton, Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Beatrice Sinclair, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margaret Hoppringle antes de 1457. Murió el 7 de febrero de 1484, en Scotland, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland.
